test-case.name: DumpCoasterAfterImport("Assets/Tests/Assets/all_types.kex")
test-case.output:
=== COASTER AFTER IMPORT === Nodes: 21 Ports: 106 Edges: 24
=== BRIDGE NODES IN COASTER ===
Bridge Node 525679038: Position: float2(-530f, 2422f) Input count: 4 Output count: 2 Schema expects: Input[0] = Anchor (PortDataType.Anchor, 0) Input[1] = Target (PortDataType.Anchor, 1) Input[2] = OutWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 1) Input[3] = InWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 0) Actual input ports: Input[0]: Port 1764097772 = Anchor, LocalIndex=0 Connected from: Node 3763452536 (Geometric) Input[1]: Port 880120380 = Anchor, LocalIndex=1 Connected from: Node 223487201 (Anchor) Input[2]: Port 454458332 = Scalar, LocalIndex=1 NOT CONNECTED Input[3]: Port 967622131 = Scalar, LocalIndex=0 NOT CONNECTED Target port (input[1]) connected: True
Bridge Node 978933242: Position: float2(-530f, 2926f) Input count: 4 Output count: 2 Schema expects: Input[0] = Anchor (PortDataType.Anchor, 0) Input[1] = Target (PortDataType.Anchor, 1) Input[2] = OutWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 1) Input[3] = InWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 0) Actual input ports: Input[0]: Port 1703894615 = Anchor, LocalIndex=0 Connected from: Node 958648347 (CopyPath) Input[1]: Port 2136017453 = Anchor, LocalIndex=1 Connected from: Node 548289554 (Anchor) Input[2]: Port 1132995222 = Scalar, LocalIndex=1 NOT CONNECTED Input[3]: Port 1584916285 = Scalar, LocalIndex=0 NOT CONNECTED Target port (input[1]) connected: True

=== COASTER AFTER IMPORT === Nodes: 12 Ports: 74 Edges: 11
=== BRIDGE NODES IN COASTER ===
Bridge Node 11: Position: float2(-290f, 1846f) Input count: 4 Output count: 2 Schema expects: Input[0] = Anchor (PortDataType.Anchor, 0) Input[1] = Target (PortDataType.Anchor, 1) Input[2] = OutWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 1) Input[3] = InWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 0) Actual input ports: Input[0]: Port 2944132454 = Anchor, LocalIndex=0 Connected from: Node 6 (Geometric) Input[1]: Port 2577384215 = Anchor, LocalIndex=1 Connected from: Node 2079899705 (Anchor) Input[2]: Port 1 = Scalar, LocalIndex=1 NOT CONNECTED Input[3]: Port 2 = Scalar, LocalIndex=0 NOT CONNECTED Target port (input[1]) connected: True
Bridge Node 2079899704: Position: float2(-290f, 2206f) Input count: 4 Output count: 2 Schema expects: Input[0] = Anchor (PortDataType.Anchor, 0) Input[1] = Target (PortDataType.Anchor, 1) Input[2] = OutWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 1) Input[3] = InWeight (PortDataType.Scalar, 0) Actual input ports: Input[0]: Port 594452232 = Anchor, LocalIndex=0 Connected from: Node 11 (Bridge) Input[1]: Port 2099545353 = Anchor, LocalIndex=1 Connected from: Node 3 (Anchor) Input[2]: Port 4223512233 = Scalar, LocalIndex=1 NOT CONNECTED Input[3]: Port 4223512234 = Scalar, LocalIndex=0 NOT CONNECTED Target port (input[1]) connected: True

test-case.name: EvaluateBridgeNodesSuccessfully("Assets/Tests/Assets/all_types.kex")
test-case.output:
=== EVALUATION RESULT FOR Assets/Tests/Assets/all_types.kex === Sections: 14 NodeToSection mappings: 14
Bridge Node 525679038: Has section: True (index: 10) Section length: 355
Bridge Node 978933242: Has section: True (index: 12) Section length: 176

test-case.output: === EVALUATION RESULT FOR Assets/Tests/Assets/shuttle.kex === Sections: 9 NodeToSection mappings: 9

test-case.name: VerifyBridgePortSpecSchema
test-case.output:
=== BRIDGE PORT SCHEMA === Input[0] = Anchor (Anchor, LocalIndex=0) Input[1] = Target (Anchor, LocalIndex=1) Input[2] = Out Weight (Scalar, LocalIndex=1) Input[3] = In Weight (Scalar, LocalIndex=0) Output[0] = Anchor (Anchor, LocalIndex=0) Output[1] = Path (Path, LocalIndex=0)
=== BRIDGE PORTS CONSTANTS === BridgePorts.Anchor = 0 BridgePorts.Target = 1 BridgePorts.OutWeight = 2 BridgePorts.InWeight = 3

test-case.name: VerifyLegacyPortTypeToSchemaMapping
test-case.output:
=== LEGACY PORT TYPE VALUES === PortType.Anchor = 0 PortType.InWeight = 16 PortType.OutWeight = 17
Bridge node in legacy format typically has: Input[0]: Anchor Input[1]: Anchor (Target - if present) Input[2]: OutWeight Input[3]: InWeight

test-case.name: Kernel_MultipleSegments_ProcessesAll
test-case.output: Internal: JobTempAlloc has allocations that are more than the maximum lifespan of 4 frames old - this is not allowed and likely a leak To Debug, run app with -diag-job-temp-memory-leak-validation cmd line argument. This will output the callstacks of the leaked allocations.

test-case.name: Diagnostic_SwitchSectionConnections
test-case.output:
=== SWITCH SECTION CONNECTIONS === TraversalCount: 6, SectionCount: 7
Traversal[0] = Section 0 (FWD): StartPos: float3(0f, 3f, 0f), StartDir: float3(0f, 0f, -1f) EndPos: float3(0f, 3f, -39.8f), EndDir: float3(0f, 0f, -1f) Prev=-1, Next=1(AtStart=True, Flip=False) -> Next section 1 (FWD): distToStart=0.000, distToEnd=61.460
Traversal[1] = Section 1 (FWD): StartPos: float3(0f, 3f, -39.8f), StartDir: float3(0f, 0f, -1f) EndPos: float3(-26.60592f, 14.45306f, -94.00629f), EndDir: float3(-0.6168894f, 0.6087089f, -0.4989199f) Prev=0(AtStart=False, Flip=False), Next=2(AtStart=True, Flip=False) -> Prev section 0 (FWD): distToStart=39.800, distToEnd=0.000 -> Next section 2 (FWD): distToStart=0.000, distToEnd=38.345
Traversal[2] = Section 2 (FWD): StartPos: float3(-26.60592f, 14.45306f, -94.00629f), StartDir: float3(-0.6168894f, 0.6087089f, -0.4989199f) EndPos: float3(-43.63498f, 45.92815f, -107.7788f), EndDir: float3(-0.3582331f, 0.8875399f, -0.2897275f) Prev=1(AtStart=False, Flip=False), Next=3(AtStart=True, Flip=False) -> Prev section 1 (FWD): distToStart=61.460, distToEnd=0.000 -> Next section 3 (FWD, COSMETIC): distToStart=0.000, distToEnd=9.812
Traversal[3] = Section 4 (REV): StartPos: float3(-43.63498f, 45.92815f, -107.7788f), StartDir: float3(0.3582331f, -0.8875399f, 0.2897275f) EndPos: float3(-26.60592f, 14.45305f, -94.00629f), EndDir: float3(0.6168895f, -0.608709f, 0.4989199f) Prev=3(AtStart=True, Flip=True), Next=5(AtStart=True, Flip=False) -> Prev section 3 (FWD, COSMETIC): distToStart=0.000, distToEnd=9.812 -> Next section 5 (REV): distToStart=0.000, distToEnd=12.527

reason.message: Extreme overhang did not crash or hang
